chapters.title: Storm at Sea
chapters.content: A sudden storm forced Leo’s boat to stop near a small unknown island. The sky was dark, and the waves were strong.

chapters.title: Exploring Alone
chapters.content: While waiting for help, Leo walked across the island. He found old ruins, tropical birds, and a strange stone path hidden in the trees.

chapters.title: The Secret Beach
chapters.content: At the end of the path, he discovered a hidden beach with crystal-clear water. It looked like a place nobody had seen for years.
